short_description: Excel upload of voter list -> master database
acceptance_criteria: Master list uploads successful; uploaded records searchable; master fields non-editable

short_description: Search by name/mobile/Aadhaar and open voter profile
acceptance_criteria: Search returns correct profile within 2 sec; staff can update allowed fields

short_description: Create service requests against voter profiles
acceptance_criteria: Office user can create request; service appears in admin list
Status changes recorded with timestamp; history view shows full audit trail

short_description: Trigger WhatsApp/SMS/AI call on status change
acceptance_criteria: Messages sent to registered mobile; template populated with name/service/status

short_description: Admin and Office User roles + RBAC
acceptance_criteria: Admins can manage services and upload lists; office users limited to search/create/update

short_description: Family head and member linking rules
acceptance_criteria: Family tree shows correct links; only master list used for linking
Scheduled messages sent on date; reports show delivered/pending
Admin creates form and it's immediately available for data entry

priority: Exports generate correct CSV/PDF; filters return accurate counts

acceptance_criteria: Integration tested end-to-end; log contains delivery status and failure reasons
RBAC enforced; audit logs capture data entry and status updates
